title: Sqlitelogictest - Omitting AS in a result set column alias name
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab1(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, age INTEGER, salary REAL, active INTEGER);
INSERT INTO tab1(name, age, salary, active) VALUES('Alice', 30, 70000.00, 1);
INSERT INTO tab1(name, age, salary, active) VALUES('Bob', 25, 50000.50, 0);
SELECT -salary AS col1 FROM tab1 WHERE age IS NULL;
SELECT -salary FROM tab1 WHERE age IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Omitting AS in column alias name causes errors
